name: Jackie Gleason
blurb: 'The Great One'; creator of The Honeymooners' Ralph Kramden.
bio: Jackie Gleason (1916-1987) was an American comedian and actor whose variety programs and the classic sitcom The Honeymooners made him one of 1950s television's biggest stars, indelible as the bombastic bus driver Ralph Kramden.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
